title: Property Consultant - Colliers India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Colliers India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!
